entry.title: Cloudflare Agents SDK
entry.description: Cloudflare framework for building, deploying, and running AI agents on Workers with durable platform primitives.
entry.seoTitle: Cloudflare Agents SDK for AI agents
entry.seoDescription: Cloudflare Agents SDK helps build, deploy, and run AI agents on Workers with Cloudflare platform primitives.
entry.author: Cloudflare
entry.cardDescription: Framework for building AI agents on Cloudflare Workers.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Cloudflare Agents SDK is relevant for teams that want agent runtimes close to edge compute, durable objects, and serverless deployment.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
